task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "初始化GUI界面"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "创建文件选择对话框以选择MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "加载所选音频文件"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "提取并显示音频文件的技术参数（如大小、时长、采样率等）"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "播放音频文件的前15秒片段"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "提示用户确认音频清晰度是否满足要求"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "根据用户反馈决定是否重新选择文件或继续处理"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "将MP3文件转换为WAV格式"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "设置音频采样率为16kHz"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "将音频调整为单声道"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "导出优化后的音频文件"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "调用语音识别引擎处理音频"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "将识别结果保存至文本文件"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "显示部分识别结果的预览"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "清理临时生成的WAV文件"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "initialize"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "fileSelected"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "loadAudio"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "displayInfo"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "playAudio"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "userFeedback"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node2", "type": "reselectFile"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "continueProcessing"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "convertToWav"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "setSampleRate"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "setMonoChannel"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "exportOptimizedAudio"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "recognizeSpeech"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "saveTranscript"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node15", "type": "previewResult"}, {"source": "Node15", "target": "Node7", "type": "cleanupTempFiles"}]}
